---
title: "Contact"
---

You can contact me by email:

omid dot mirzamohammadi at esat dot kuleuven dot be

## Affiliation

COSIC, KU Leuven, Leuven, Belgium

## Links

- [GitHub](https://github.com/omid76)
- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=0WK2UcMAAAAJ&hl=en)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/omid-mirzamohammadi-972782159/)
